name: complexity classification via reductions & completeness
signature: the task is to place a computational problem in a complexity class, the tool being reductions / completeness under that class

name: qualitative theory of smooth dynamical systems
signature: the long-term or global structure of the solutions of a smooth flow/map (attractors, limit cycles, relative equilibria) is the unknown

name: complexity of real/numerical computation (Blum–Shub–Smale)
signature: the cost of a numerical algorithm over ℝ/ℂ, measured in arithmetic operations and conditioning rather than bit-size
